Package org.mitre.synthea.engine

Class ReactionProbabilities

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.ReactionProbabilities
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ReactionProbabilities extends Object implements Serializable
ReactionProbabilities is a structure to capture the kind and severity of reaction for a given AllergyIntolerance.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ReactionProbabilities.SeverityProbability
    Represents the severity level and its associated probability for a reaction.

    This will validate the reaction probabilities and generate the underlying objects used to get weighted samples of reaction severities.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReactionProbabilities

      public ReactionProbabilities(HealthRecord.Code code, List<ReactionProbabilities.SeverityProbability> possibleReactions)
      Constructs a ReactionProbabilities object with a reaction code and possible severities.
      Parameters:
      code - The reaction code.
      possibleReactions - The list of possible severities and their probabilities.

  • Method Details

    • getReaction

      public HealthRecord.Code getReaction()
      Gets the reaction code.
      Returns:
      The reaction code.

    • setReaction

      public void setReaction(HealthRecord.Code reaction)
      Sets the reaction code.
      Parameters:
      reaction - The reaction code.

    • isPopulated

      public boolean isPopulated()
      Checks if the ReactionProbabilities object has any possible severities defined.
      Returns:
      True if there are possible severities, false otherwise.

    • buildReactionDistributions

      public void buildReactionDistributions()
      This will validate the reaction probabilities and generate the underlying objects used to get weighted samples of reaction severities.

    • validate

      public boolean validate()
      Validates the reaction probabilities to ensure that the sum of all probabilities is less than or equal to 1.0.
      Returns:
      true if the reaction probabilities are valid, false otherwise

    • generateSeverity

      public HealthRecord.ReactionSeverity generateSeverity(Person person)
      Generate a severity for the reaction of an allergy or intolerance. This uses the passed in person for the random seed. There is a possibility that the reaction will not be selected for an individual. In that case, the method returns null.
      Parameters:
      person - used for random seed
      Returns:
      a ReactionSeverity value to indicate severity or null
